basic_details.job_title: SVBPH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi (SVBPH Delhi) Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the SVBPH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Upto 30 years for UR, 33 years for OBC & 35 years for ST candidates on the date of interview. Further upper age limit for persons with disabilities shall be relaxable by 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from a NMC recognized university
qualification.details: MBBS Degree from a NMC recognized university/Institute with internship completion certificate. Foreign Graduates must have cleared FMG Examination. The candidate must not have done junior residency of one year from any recognized institute. Must possess valid Delhi Medical Council registration. Must have completed rotating internship by the date of interview. Internship completed not before 02 years of date of interview.

salary_details.details: Basic Pay of Rs.56,100/- and other allowances as admissible under the rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SVBPH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident posts at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi is scheduled for 26th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Junior Residents at SVBPH Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Junior Resident position at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a NMC recognized university/Institute with a completion certificate for their internship. A valid Delhi Medical Council registration is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Resident post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident post will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100 per month, along with other admissible allowances as per the rules.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Junior Resident position at SVBPH Delhi?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the SVBPH Delhi Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, internship completion certificate, Delhi Medical Council registration, and one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for SVBPH Delhi Junior Resident recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for the exact venue details. However, the recruitment is for Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi, located in New Delhi, pincode 110008.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the Junior Resident job at SVBPH Delhi?
faq.answer: The Junior Resident position at Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi is on an Ad-hoc basis.
